result:
**Goal: Add a Tornado & Supercell Storm simulation mode.**

This fits the project's trajectory of increasingly complex natural phenomena (volcanic eruption, aurora borealis, black hole). The mode would simulate a rotating supercell thunderstorm with a descending tornado vortex — modeling updraft/downdraft wind fields, a visible funnel cloud, flying debris particles, rain curtains, and lightning flashes. ASCII rendering of the rotating mesocyclone and ground-contact destruction path would make for a visually striking addition to the Physics & Waves category.

Want me to implement it?
